label: Font scale
summary: The seven sanctioned text sizes, 10px to 48px, as utility classes.
era: The <font size=1..7> ladder at the browsers' own mapping, 10, 13, 16, 18, 24, 32, 48 pixels of pure 1997 hierarchy.
a11y: Pixel names, rem values underneath, browser zoom and user font-size overrides keep working. For contrast, steps 1-4 are body text; only 5 and up count as large (4 sneaks in when bold).
